title: Elon closes Twitter deal, $META uncertainty, Zuck's historic bet, big tech decline & more
description:
(0:00) Sacks is back!

(1:01) Sacks recaps his week off

(3:13) Elon finalizes Twitter deal, immediate content moderation decisions, platform potential

(31:19) Meta's historic bet on VR and stock price predicament, governance structure, and more

(1:02:52) Big tech's 2022 decline, macro outlook, market breakdown

(1:06:32) Ukraine update: Progressives call for diplomacy, then flip flop, chip sanctions on China

(1:27:29) Science corner: Gut microbiome advancements

analysis.summary: The episode covers Elon Musk's Twitter deal, Meta's historic bet on VR, big tech's decline, and the Ukraine update. The hosts also discuss science advancements in the gut microbiome. They analyze the macro outlook and market breakdown, as well as chip sanctions on China.

takeaways.text: Meta's VR bet faces stock price uncertainty
Progressives call for diplomacy in Ukraine
Market breakdown and macro outlook discussed
Twitter's content moderation decisions are immediate

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss both positive and negative developments, including Elon Musk's Twitter deal and big tech's decline. The tone is generally neutral and analytical.
